summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of The Rise of Regional Powers in socialscience.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 8 socialscience explains the core concepts of The Rise of Regional Powers. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.
